title: Sand Duplicator
description: Duplicates sand (or gravel, concrete powder) using a TNT-based or falling block glitch. The classic design places sand on a trapdoor above a TNT block — a piston pushes a block next to the sand, creating a falling sand entity, while simultaneously a TNT explosion absorbs the falling entity and spawns a duplicate when the sand lands. Requires careful timing via repeaters. Note: this is a technical exploit, not intended gameplay. May be patched in future versions. Each activation yields 1 extra sand block.

steps.title: Stone base and TNT platform
steps.explanation: Stone base at y=0, x=0–3, z=0–2. Place TNT at (1,1,1) — the explosive that duplicates the falling block entity. Place an iron trapdoor at (1,2,1) in the open (horizontal) position — the sand will sit on it. Place sand at (1,3,1) resting on the closed trapdoor.

steps.title: Piston and trigger wiring
steps.explanation: Place a sticky piston at (0,3,1) facing east — when extended it pushes the sand east, converting it to a falling-sand entity at (1,3,1). Place a redstone torch at (0,2,1) on the stone to provide signal. Route dust from a button at (3,1,0) through a repeater at (2,1,0) facing west (delay=1) and a repeater at (1,1,0) facing west (delay=2). First repeater ignites TNT at (1,1,1) via dust; second repeater fires the piston 1 tick later so the sand falls into the explosion zone. Each button press yields one duplicate sand.
